# Systems / Gear — Juplaya Trailer Build

Split from `../juplaya-trailer-context.md` (doc divorce, design-panel run).

## Fridge — PURCHASED + integration DECIDED (D008)
- **Dometic CFX3 95DZ** (95 L dual-zone, 12/24 VDC; 24 V: 4.6 A rated; 37.9"×20.9"×18.6", 66.4 lb; ambient ceiling 110 °F — [specs](../dometic-cfx3-95dz-specs.md)). The DC-compressor-not-Midea call held; owner sized up by purchase.
- **Integration:** native **24 V** off the house bus (10 A fuse, 14 AWG — see [power](power.md)); bay in [interior](interior.md) with the **thermal gate** (ventilated/shaded, away from the AIO/converter heat plume; dual-zone setpoint cap >86 °F ambient) and the lid-hinge check. Energy ~1.0–1.3 kWh/day in July heat (budget in [power](power.md)).

## Accessories order
- Proven 2516 coupler lock; 2× Abloy/Paclock puck locks **keyed-alike**; Trimax TCL65 boot; LandAirSea 54 (hardwired, 6–24 V → on the 24 V block); Blue Sea 5026 12-circuit fuse block (the 24 V distribution block); 2× 12 V sockets *(retire or feed via POL 24→12 bucks)*; 1× USB-C PD panel (Scanstrut SC-USB-F3, 24 V-fed); 2× dome + 1× task light *(24 V or POL-fed)*.

## Bus-decision parts (D006/D007 — order long-lead)
- Victron Orion-Tr 48/24-16A isolated · Blue Sea 7443 20 A (80 V) breaker · Fiamma F45s 350 06280B01R + Tie Down S 98655-133 + lag anchors + deadman bags · riser-bracket + backing steel (owner fab) · 14 AWG runs + fuse assortment + 2–3 POL 24→12 bucks.
